title: T-021 — Cascading rule manufacturing_operation_N → intermediate_code_pN with fg.intermediate_code_changed event
prompt:
# T-021 — Cascading rule manufacturing_operation_N → intermediate_code_pN with fg.intermediate_code_changed event

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §9.1, §7
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`

## Goal
Wire the §9.1 Chain-2 cascade rule using the rule executor (T-018), the manufacturing operations seed (T-020), and the outbox (T-008). Emit fg.intermediate_code_changed.

## Implementation contract
Insert the JSON rule definition from PRD §9.1 into Reference.Rules (rule_id='manufacturing_operation_to_intermediate_code_cascade', rule_type='cascading'). Implement packages/rule-engine/src/cascade-handler.ts that listens for fg.manufacturing_operation_N.changed (N=1..4), runs the executor against the rule, looks up Reference.ManufacturingOperations.process_suffix, generates intermediate_code_pN = '<prefix>-<process_suffix>-<seq>' (prefix from Reference.CodePrefixes default 'WIP'), updates the row, and emits fg.intermediate_code_changed via the outbox. Add fg.intermediate_code_changed to events.enum.ts (T-003) extension test. E2E test inserts an FG row, sets manufacturing_operation_1='Mix' for a bakery org, runs the handler, and asserts intermediate_code_p1 like 'WIP-MX-%' plus the outbox event.

## Files (scope)
- packages/rule-engine/src/cascade-handler.ts [create]
- packages/db/seeds/cascade-rules.sql [create]
- packages/outbox/src/events.enum.ts [modify]
- packages/rule-engine/src/__tests__/cascade-mfg.e2e.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a bakery org and an FG row, when manufacturing_operation_1 is set to 'Mix' and the cascade handler runs, then intermediate_code_p1 matches /^WIP-MX-\d{7}$/ and an outbox row with event_type='fg.intermediate_code_changed' is emitted
2. Given operation_name 'Mix' is missing from Reference.ManufacturingOperations for the org, when the handler runs, then it throws 'operation_not_found' and rolls back without partial updates
3. Given a pharma org with operation_name='Synthesis', when the handler runs, then intermediate_code_pN matches /^WIP-SY-\d{7}$/ (WIP prefix override would come from Reference.CodePrefixes; default WIP for pharma in this seed)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/rule-engine/src/__tests__/cascade-mfg.e2e.test.ts replicating §9.1 §Chain-2 example before cascade-handler.ts exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/rule-engine test:e2e'

## Risk red lines
- Wave0 v4.3: business/application scope is org_id; tenant_id is control-plane only unless explicitly justified.
- Do not partial-update on lookup miss — atomicity is required
- Do not bypass the outbox for the resulting event

## Dependencies (must be complete first)
- T-008
- T-018
- T-020

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED test before implementation) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.
